hallucination.rationale: The generated note contains no actual clinical note — it is entirely a thinking/planning process that was never converted into a final output. There is no clinical note to evaluate, which constitutes a fundamental failure.

instruction_following.rationale: The output is entirely a thinking/reasoning process and never produces an actual clinical note. It fails to follow the most basic instruction of generating a structured clinical note.

completeness.rationale: No clinical note was produced, so no transcript content was captured in a usable output format.
missed_items: All transcript content — no note was generated

template_adherence.rationale: No structured clinical note was output. The entire output is an internal reasoning/planning document with no template-adherent sections.

entity_marking.rationale: No entity marking was performed because no clinical note was generated.

duplication.rationale: The thinking process contains massive repetitive loops, with the same line about 'hyperlipidemia' repeated hundreds of times in an apparent infinite loop.
